calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for Steven Sturgeon (Petitioner)

Mr. Paolini referred to his supplemental declaration filed on May 10th, stating distribution for taxable income, and distribution has been made already. The Final Report of Administration, etc. is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
